title: Black Smokers Explained
script_summary: Exploring the fascinating world of black smokers and their underwater ecosystems.

segments.voiceover: Superheated mineral-rich water erupts from seafloor vents, building chimneys in the dark.
These black smokers are found deep in the ocean, where sunlight never reaches.
They spew out metal-rich fluids at temperatures over 400 degrees Celsius!
These conditions create unique habitats, home to extremophiles and bizarre creatures.
Black smokers challenge our understanding of life, thriving where nothing else can.
Want to dive deeper? Like and subscribe for more ocean mysteries!
